content: Backend: extend `routers/admin.py` business-rules CRUD to support all 4 new rule types
Backend: create `services/business_rules_service.py` with version, overlap, duplicate, timeline
Backend: add `GET /api/admin/business-rules/timeline` endpoint with overlap flags
Backend: extend seed-defaults to seed baseline policies for all 4 rule types
Frontend: create shared components — ScopePicker, RuleListLayout, RuleHistoryPanel — with URL-query persistence
Frontend: extend AdminPortal SUB_ROUTES + add /admin/configuration/* routing with subnav
Backend: wire HR `calculate_service_charge` to load defaults from `service_charge_policy` (verified working)
Call testing_agent for backend + frontend smoke
